title: Audit and close remaining BES3 implementation-plan gaps
description: Audit the current BES3 site against docs/bes3-design-implementation-plan.md, preserve existing worktree changes, and implement or verify the highest-priority outstanding requirements through deployment readiness.
close_reason: Audited and completed the BES3 implementation plan: production release, CTA integration, automated quality gates, cross-engine E2E, and bes3.com verification all passed.

title: 丰富 BES3 文章并完成 2025/2026 日期治理
description: 新增读者导向的护肤文章以丰富现有内容，并确保已发布文章覆盖 2025 与 2026；移除或拦截所有晚于 2026-07-21 的前端可见日期，增加自动化发布日期校验。
close_reason: 已补齐指定 ISDIN 与中立内容集群，新增 2025 Melatonin 文章和唯一封面；已为 26 篇文章加入 2025/2026 覆盖与无未来日期校验，并完成生产发布验证。

title: 完成 BES3 目标级验收审计
description: 依据 docs/bes3-design-implementation-plan.md 逐项核对当前开发、内容、ISDIN CTA、自动化测试、Cloudflare Pages 部署及 bes3.com 生产验证证据；若发现缺口则修复并复验。

title: 清理全站面向开发者的文案并完成上线内容审核
description: 逐页检查 BES3 静态站内容，移除上线前备注、内部实现说明和占位文本，替换为完整、专业且面向读者的隐私政策与站内文案；构建并验证生产输出。
close_reason: 已审查并构建 42 个公开页面，清除内部/上线前文案，完成真实隐私说明、公开文案回归检查、浏览器无障碍测试与 Cloudflare Pages 发布。

title: Deploy bes3.com to Cloudflare Pages after OAuth approval
description: Authorize Wrangler with the approved local Cloudflare OAuth flow, deploy the verified static build to Pages, bind custom domains, add CSP deployment header, and validate live routes, SEO artifacts, and affiliate CTA destinations.
close_reason: Cloudflare Pages deployed, bes3.com and www redirect configured, CSP and Pagefind verified in production.

title: 修复并验证 ui-ux-pro-max 技能安装
description: 当前技能目录缺少 scripts/search.py 和设计数据库；定位可信上游，完整安装并运行设计系统查询验证，然后将结果用于 BES3。
close_reason: 已从 nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill 官方仓库完整安装，备份旧版本，验证 12 个设计域、22 个栈并成功持久化 BES3 设计系统与 Astro 查询结果

title: 开发、测试并上线 BES3 网站
description: 依据 docs/bes3-design-implementation-plan.md 完成 Astro 静态站、BES3 设计系统、通用内容、Brand Focus: ISDIN、联盟 CTA、自动化测试、Cloudflare Pages 部署和 bes3.com 生产验证。
acceptance_criteria: bes3.com 生产站可访问；核心页面与内容完整；ISDIN CTA 与披露可用；构建、类型检查、自动化测试、可访问性和浏览器验收通过；Cloudflare Pages 与自定义域名验证完成。
notes:
已完成自定义 OpenAI 兼容生图端点的本地安全配置；密钥仅存于被 Git 忽略的 .env.local，.env.example 仅含占位符。
2026-07-21: Cloudflare Pages direct-upload controls do not trigger the macOS file chooser through Computer Use after AX, coordinate, and keyboard attempts. Awaiting user approval to create a persistent local Cloudflare OAuth credential through Wrangler, then upload dist and bind production domains.
2026-07-21: Resumed deployment investigation; continuing with the existing Cloudflare dashboard session before requesting OAuth authorization.
2026-07-21: Re-ran npm run check successfully (format, lint, typecheck, 5 tests, build, internal links, affiliate-link validation). Cloudflare direct-upload remains unable to receive dist through file chooser, Finder drag/drop, or clipboard paste. Wrangler is unauthenticated; bes3.com returns 403 and bes3.pages.dev returns 522. Awaiting explicit approval for Cloudflare OAuth via Wrangler.
2026-07-21: Production-preflight e2e found an ambiguous homepage hero-image test selector after the Brand Focus artwork update. Fixing the test to assert the hero image's exact accessible name, then rerunning e2e and complete checks.
2026-07-21: Resolved e2e selector ambiguity and WCAG 2.2 AA contrast failures for indexed/mobile navigation labels. Added MerchantLink so unapproved ISDIN links render as official editorial destinations; AffiliateCTA now requires approved affiliate configuration and commercial metadata. Verified 6 Playwright+Axe tests and npm run check. Awaiting explicit approval for Cloudflare OAuth to deploy and production-verify.
2026-07-21: User explicitly approved Cloudflare OAuth for Wrangler. Resuming production deployment, domain configuration, and production verification.
close_reason: BES3 site developed, tested, deployed to Cloudflare Pages, and production-verified at https://bes3.com.

title: Diversify editorial imagery and create fictional product packaging
description: Replace repetitive portrait poses and blank unbranded product packaging in BES3 editorial artwork with a varied set of original visuals using clearly fictional skincare brands and no real trademarks.
notes: Replaced all 28 editorial WebP assets with visually diverse originals. Product packaging uses the fictional LUMERA brand only; ISDIN article imagery displays a fictional-prop disclosure. Validated with npm run check, 36 Playwright e2e tests, and browser screenshots.
close_reason: Diversified imagery and fictional packaging completed and visually verified.

title: Switch operating workspace to Kiro ISDIN
description: Confirm the requested workspace /Users/jason/Documents/Kiro/ISDIN is available and use it for subsequent operations.
close_reason: Verified the requested directory exists and set it as the active working directory for subsequent commands.

title: Diversify editorial people imagery
description: Audit editorial imagery for repeated human poses and expressions, then replace overly similar visuals with a varied, cohesive set of original skincare-editorial assets.
close_reason: Editorial people imagery diversified across the refreshed asset set and browser-verified.

title: Condense ISDIN affiliate application introduction
description: Create a shorter application-ready English marketing introduction without citing editorial article counts.
close_reason: Prepared a concise application introduction without article-count claims.

title: Refine ISDIN affiliate application marketing introduction
description: Update the English affiliate-application profile to accurately reflect BES3's current editorial coverage, qualified traffic approach, and compliance practices.
close_reason: Produced an updated application-ready English introduction aligned with BES3's current 26-article editorial site, ISDIN Brand Focus coverage, compliance disclosures, and actual no-newsletter privacy posture.

title: Audit requested ISDIN editorial cluster coverage
description: Verify the requested ISDIN and brand-neutral article clusters are present, current, and publication-ready; identify any gaps before further content work.
close_reason: Verified all 15 requested topics are present; editorial and affiliate-link checks plus 14 end-to-end tests pass.

title: 评估 Hallmark 对 BES3 前端设计的提升价值
description: 分析 Nutlope/hallmark 的架构、设计生成能力、依赖、许可与维护状态，并评估其对 BES3 美感、独特性、性能和 Cloudflare 静态部署的适配度。
acceptance_criteria: 形成基于源码和实际能力的采用建议、风险清单与可执行接入方案。
close_reason: 已完成 Hallmark 源码、案例、维护状态与 BES3 适配性评估；结论为选择性采用其审计和结构方法，不整站替换设计系统。

title: 完善 BES3 方案并增加 ISDIN 品牌专栏与联盟 CTA
close_reason: 已完善 BES3 设计与实施方案：新增 Brand Focus: ISDIN 专栏、专题路由、6 篇内容计划、AffiliateCTA 组件、推广链接治理、披露、追踪及验收规范

title: 编写 BES3 完整设计与实施方案文档
close_reason: 已在 docs/bes3-design-implementation-plan.md 完成 BES3 品牌中立护肤媒体的设计与实施方案，涵盖品牌、页面、视觉、内容、Astro、Cloudflare Pages、合规、里程碑和验收标准
